TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 10, Karl Nehammer , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Austria ta' misuw hya' ga Karl Nehammer, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, karl neńßammer , s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw aus~…ētria ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a karl neńßammer, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 10, Karl Nehammer , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Austria ta' misuw hya' ga Karl Nehammer, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
